base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_and_inventory — a ui (hud_readout) from 1988 super mario bros 3. HUD bar with World/Lives/Coins/Score/Time + inventory-grid (reserve item-box — signature SMB3 mechanic). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: HUD bar with World/Lives/Coins/Score/Time + inventory-grid (reserve item-box — signature SMB3 mechanic)
